breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where non-standard reward box keys (xp/gold_pieces) from LLM responses weren't being normalized in streaming passthrough. The fix adds a normalization function that handles fallback key mapping and removes raw keys. The test coverage is excellent - it exercises the actual code path with a real LLM. However, type safety is weak (no type hints on the new function, no TypedDict for rewards_box shape), and documentation is minimal (the new function lacks a docstring).
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function to handle xp->xp_gained and gold_pieces->gold fallback mappings
Created new test file test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py that validates the fix with real LLM
Removed raw keys (xp, gold_pieces) after normalization to prevent persistence of messy data
Added comment explaining WHY the normalization exists (LLM-generated payloads use non-standard boolean representations)
